text: Being here, I am engulfed in a sense of quiet observation. The modernity and sterility of the glass and concrete create a certain detachment, while the colorful R+D space invites curiosity and reflection. I feel both the pressure of visibility and a subtle longing to be understood in a world of innovation—a place where my thoughts might be amplified or misunderstood. There’s an introspective tension, a delicate dance between expressing my inner world and navigating the expectations of the space around me.
